summary: Stage 1 + Stage 2 (Room Booking financials on Checkout) verified primarily via static code review + a new Jest transform-level test suite. 7/7 transform tests PASS covering: fromAPI.order roomInfo exposure (present/absent/coercion), collectBillExisting grand_total conditional emission, and check-in marker filtering. Live UI end-to-end test against preprod could not be completed in this session — the Emergent preview iframe wrapper required manual server wake-up and the login form lives in a nested iframe whose inputs were not consistently reachable through Playwright in this run (3 attempts). Stage 1 + Stage 2 code is correctly placed at all anchor points cited in the review request and is functionally validated at the transform boundary, which is where every UI consumer eventually feeds into.

code_audit.stage1_orderTransform_L272_276: PASS — fromAPI.order returns roomInfo: { roomPrice, advancePayment, balancePayment } via parseFloat coercion when api.room_info present; null otherwise.
code_audit.stage2_collectPaymentPanel_L86_113: PASS — visibleCartItemCount, hasCheckInMarker, isMarkerOnlyRoom, roomBalance memos. roomBalance = isRoom && roomInfo ? Math.max(0, balancePayment || 0) : 0 — clamped ≥0 (overpaid rooms show ₹0).
code_audit.stage2_collectPaymentPanel_L344_375_hand: PASS — effectiveTotal = (roomHasTransfers ? finalTotal+associatedTotal : finalTotal) + roomBalance. Passes both finalTotal:effectiveTotal AND roomBalance through paymentData.
code_audit.stage2_collectPaymentPanel_L497_513_head: PASS — Sticky header total renders combined value (food[+associated]+roomBalance). Split Bill onClick passes the same combined number.
code_audit.stage2_collectPaymentPanel_L782_825_room: PASS — Room section is the FIRST block when isRoom && roomInfo. Renders chevron-toggleable 'ROOM · ₹{roomBalance}' header with data-testid checkout-room-booking-toggle / checkout-room-balance / checkout-room-price / checkout-room-advance / Balance line. Independent of associatedOrders presence (Branch A & B both supported).
code_audit.stage2_collectPaymentPanel_L1154_total_r: PASS — Total row in transferred branch uses finalTotal + associatedTotal + roomBalance.
code_audit.stage2_orderTransform_L807_813_destructu: PASS — roomBalance defaulted to 0 from paymentData.
code_audit.stage2_orderTransform_L912_918_grand_tot: PASS — `...(roomBalance > 0 ? { grand_total: finalTotal || 0 } : {})` — field absent for non-room / zero-balance flows; present for rooms with balance. NOTE: The injected `grand_total` value equals `finalTotal` (which is `effectiveTotal` from handlePayment), so it carries the FULL combined payable per L1 architecture.
code_audit.stage2_orderEntry_L1014_pass_through: PASS — orderData?.roomInfo || null is forwarded to CollectPaymentPanel.

coverage: Stage1 — roomInfo populated when api.room_info present
Stage1 — roomInfo null when api.room_info missing
Stage1 — roomInfo coerces strings->numbers, null fields->0
Stage2 — grand_total ABSENT when roomBalance unset (non-room regression)
Stage2 — food_detail filters out check-in marker

live_ui_e2e.reason: Preview shell wraps the React app in a nested iframe (https://restaurant-pos-v2-1.preview.static.emergentagent.com/) gated behind a 'Wake up servers' click. After 3 attempts the input form remained non-reachable through Playwright (inputs.length === 0 in main frame; static frame URL was 'about:blank' until wake completed; login button click via JS did not progress). Per Loop Prevention rules, halted further script iteration and reported.
live_ui_e2e.what_to_do_next: Main agent or next testing agent should: 1) keep a tab warm so Wake-up isn't required, 2) login as owner@18march.com / Qplazm@10, 3) Rooms tab → check-in a fresh room with room_price > advance_payment (e.g. price=2000, advance=500 -> balance=1500), 4) open the room order → Checkout, 5) inspect Network: POST /api/v2/vendoremployee/order/order-bill-payment must contain `grand_total` field equal to combined total; 6) repeat for marker-only zero-balance room and a dine-in walk-in to confirm grand_total ABSENT.

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR — In orderTransform.collectBillExisting, the `grand_amount` field (L911) is set to `finalTotal || 0` which (post-Stage-2) is `effectiveTotal` = food + associated + roomBalance for room-with-balance. Spec note in handover says 'grand_amount = food-grand only (pre-existing semantics)'. For NON-ROOM and ZERO-BALANCE-ROOM flows behavior is byte-identical (verified by unit test), so the regression-safety contract holds. For ROOM-WITH-BALANCE flows `grand_amount` now equals `grand_total` (both are full payable). If backend distinguishes these two semantically, recommend recomputing `grand_amount` separately or carrying food-only via a new paymentData field. Current preprod 200-OK on r1/731653 confirms backend accepts identical values, so this is a code-clarity concern, not a runtime bug.

MINOR — `roomBalance` clamp `Math.max(0, roomInfo.balancePayment || 0)` correctly handles overpaid rooms but masks negative-balance UI signal (refund-due case). If backend ever needs to surface refund, the Room section should show advance > price case explicitly. Not in scope for Stage 2.
OK — defense-in-depth: Stage 2 markup respects Step 2/3 marker-hiding (the bill-summary 'Items' map filters !isCheckInMarker at L1165, food_detail filters at L825).
OK — Split Bill click amount (L500) and Pay button label (L1869) and Total row (L1154) all use the SAME math pattern, ensuring header/Pay/Total/Split numbers are consistent.
OBSERVATION — The roomInfo destructure is missing in `OrderEntry.jsx` if `orderData` is loaded post-mount; but the `?? null` fallback correctly handles undefined. ✓
action_items: MAIN_AGENT — Live UI smoke: open https://dine-payment-flow-1.preview.emergentagent.com/, log in, check-in a fresh room with non-zero balance, open Checkout, and DevTools-capture the POST /order-bill-payment payload. Expect `grand_total` field equal to (foodFinalTotal + associatedTotal + roomBalance). Verify a non-room dine-in checkout has NO `grand_total` key.

MAIN_AGENT — Visual sanity on a real fresh room: confirm Room section is the FIRST block in bill summary, chevron toggle reveals Room Charge + Advance Paid + Balance lines, and Pay button label says `Checkout ₹{combined}`.
OPTIONAL — Consider splitting `grand_amount` (food-only) from `grand_total` (full payable) in collectBillExisting for explicit semantics — see critical_code_review_comments[0].

success_rate.live_ui_e2e: 0% (not reached this run — see live_ui_e2e block)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 1 + Stage 2 code is verified at code-anchor + transform-test level. The remaining gap is a single live-UI smoke against a fresh checked-in room with balance>0. Use a browser with already-warm servers (avoid the wake-up flow). The new Jest test suite at src/api/transforms/__tests__/orderTransform.roomInfo.test.js can be re-run via `cd /app/frontend && CI=true yarn test --watchAll=false src/api/transforms/__tests__/orderTransform.roomInfo.test.js`. Iteration 4 confirmed prior Step 3 (marker scrubbing) — that filter is still in place at orderTransform L825 and was independently re-tested in this iteration's Jest suite. r1 (table-card-3245) is currently ₹336 'Preparing' from iteration_4. Do NOT settle rooms 731643/731653.
rca_of_the_issue: Not a bug-fix run — this is a forward-validation pass for Stage 1+2 of Gap 3 (Room booking financials on Checkout). Both stages match the spec and pass the boundary tests. Risk surface is minimal: Stage 1 is a pure read-side projection; Stage 2 emits an additional `grand_total` field only when roomBalance > 0 (provably absent for all non-room and zero-balance flows). Live cashier flow against a real room with non-zero balance is the last remaining verification — left to main agent or next iteration.
